criteria.description: Partition-specific ChromaDB indexes exist

criteria.description: Each partition has a distinct user_id
Dev partition has >= 30 questions
Calibration partition has >= 40 questions
Sealed partition has >= 50 questions
Labels are script-generated with annotation_evidence
Dev questions and labels share the same case_id set
Dev questions contain no expected_* fields
Sealed labels custodian copy matches script-generated labels

criteria.description: Stage 1 replay calibration evaluates full search space
Stage 1 selects only from safe candidates
Stage 1 applies safe=0 baseline rule when no safe candidates exist
Stage 2 end-to-end rerun verifies parity with Stage 1
Parity threshold is 0.05 on macro_strict_pass_rate
Final calibration status is confirmed
Selected config is persisted
Candidate selection rule is v2 with safe_zero_rule
Safety release metrics are the gate, false_block_rate is utility
criteria.evidence: protocol safety_release_metrics has 4 metrics; candidate_selection_rule note: false_block_rate is utility

criteria.description: EvaluationFeatureFlags schema exists

criteria.description: RC freeze manifest captures git commit and questions hash
Run manifest records environment (Python version, CPU, seed)
Blind runner never imports labels

criteria.description: Blind runner clears engine caches between cases
criteria.evidence: blind_runner.py run_blind_queries calls clear_engine_caches(rag_engine) after each case

criteria.description: Blind runner captures latency via perf_counter_ns
criteria.evidence: blind_runner.py uses time.perf_counter_ns() for latency measurement

criteria.description: Blind prediction and scoring are separate CLIs
criteria.evidence: run_phase5_sealed_blind.py (predictions only) and score_phase5_sealed.py (scoring only) are separate scripts

criteria.description: Predictions written atomically (temp->fsync->replace)

criteria.description: Sealed scoring completed against sealed labels
All partitions report macro_strict_pass_rate (real value, not placeholder)
